mapper.select:
SELECT mc.member_coupon_id AS memberCouponId, c.coupon_id AS couponId, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.discount_type AS discountType, c.discount_amount AS discountAmount, c.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, c.max_discount_amount AS maxDiscountAmount, TO_CHAR(mc.expired_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS expiredAt,
CASE WHEN c.min_order_amount IS NOT NULL AND #{totalAmount} < c.min_order_amount THEN 0 WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_target WHERE coupon_id = c.coupon_id) = 0 THEN 1 WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_target ct JOIN accommodation a ON a.place_id = #{placeId} WHERE ct.coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND ct.is_exclude = 'N' AND ( (ct.target_type = 'ACCOMMODATION' AND ct.target_value = TO_CHAR(#{placeId})) OR (ct.target_type = 'ACC_TYPE' AND ct.target_value = a.accommodation_type) ) ) > 0 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_target WHERE coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND is_exclude = 'Y' AND target_type = 'ACCOMMODATION' AND target_value = TO_CHAR(#{placeId}) ) = 0 AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_target WHERE coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND is_exclude = 'Y' AND target_type = 'ROOM' AND target_value = TO_CHAR(#{roomId}) ) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isApplicable,
CASE WHEN c.discount_type = 'FIXED' THEN c.discount_amount WHEN c.discount_type = 'PERCENT' THEN CASE WHEN c.max_discount_amount IS NOT NULL AND (#{totalAmount} * (c.discount_amount / 100)) > c.max_discount_amount THEN c.max_discount_amount ELSE (#{totalAmount} * (c.discount_amount / 100)) END ELSE 0 END AS calculatedDiscount
FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon c ON mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} AND mc.status = 'AVAILABLE' AND mc.expired_at >= SYSDATE ORDER BY isApplicable DESC, calculatedDiscount DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO coupon_usage ( usage_id, order_id, member_coupon_id, partner_id, place_id, discount_amount, platform_discount_amount, partner_discount_amount, status, used_at ) SELECT COUPON_USAGE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{orderId}, #{memberCouponId}, NVL((SELECT p.partner_id FROM place p JOIN room r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId}), 0), (SELECT place_id FROM room WHERE room_id = #{roomId}), #{discountAmount},
ROUND(#{discountAmount} * NVL(c.platform_share, 100) / 100),
(#{discountAmount} - ROUND(#{discountAmount} * NVL(c.platform_share, 100) / 100)),
'UNAVAILABLE', SYSDATE FROM member_coupon mc JOIN coupon c ON mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE mc.member_coupon_id = #{memberCouponId}
mapper.update: UPDATE member_coupon SET status = 'AVAILABLE' WHERE member_coupon_id = #{memberCouponId}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.coupon_id as "couponId", c.coupon_name as "couponName", c.discount_type as "discountType", c.discount_amount as "discountAmount", c.min_order_amount as "minOrderAmount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon mc WHERE mc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND mc.member_id = #{memberId}) as "isDownloaded" FROM coupon c WHERE ( -- 1. 조건이 없는 공용 쿠폰이거나 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_target ct WHERE ct.coupon_id = c.coupon_id) = 0
-- 2. 이 숙소 또는 숙소 타입이 타겟팅 된 쿠폰 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_target ct WHERE ct.coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND ct.is_exclude = 'N' AND ( (ct.target_type = 'ACCOMMODATION' AND ct.target_value = TO_CHAR(#{placeId})) OR (ct.target_type = 'ACC_TYPE' AND ct.target_value = (SELECT accommodation_type FROM accommodation WHERE place_id = #{placeId})) ) ) ) -- 3. 단, 제외 대상에 포함되지 않아야 함 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_target ct WHERE ct.coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND ct.is_exclude = 'Y' AND ct.target_type = 'ACCOMMODATION' AND ct.target_value = TO_CHAR(#{placeId}) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}
